title: eriosema ellipticum subsp. ellipticum
intro: Eriosema ellipticum subsp. ellipticum, also known as the African horsefly bean, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eriosema ellipticum subsp. ellipticum include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce oxidative stress. Eriosema ellipticum subsp. ellipticum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, making it a popular traditional remedy in African folk medicine.
